_note: No producer-computed values. Every field is a structural shape, named enum constant, or boundary condition. AC bindings are from feature-plans/ai-advisor.md AC-3.1..AC-3.4 + AC-X*. The FDR-monotonicity and single-batch-dispatch contracts are derived from the BHY/Yekutieli multiple-testing correction semantics described in Harvey & Liu 2015 and autotuner.py:_haircut_select.

operator_initiated.description: Operator specifies a logic tweak to try (e.g., change lookback window, reorder conditions, adjust weight formula)
operator_initiated._note: AC-3.1 operator-initiated mode. The change_description is a plain-text description of the structural change; the engine applies it to the variant tree before backtesting.

advisor_suggested.description: Advisor generates objective-directed logic-change candidates from the symphony tree and stated objective
advisor_suggested.candidate_generation_must: produce candidates that address the stated objective with a clear measurable basis
candidate_generation_must_not: generate candidates by exhaustively scanning every possible logic modification (unbounded scanning is the overfitting trap)
generate candidates without a stated objective
bypass the stated objective to surface pre-decided candidates
advisor_suggested._note: AC-3.1 + Gate-1 Resolution #2. Objective-directed and BOUNDED candidate generation is the overfitting control. Not brute-force scanning.

fdr_multiple_testing_guardrail._note: AC-3.2 MANDATORY. This is the load-bearing soundness contract for M4.

batch_dispatch_contract.requirement: ALL candidates in a run are submitted to evaluate_candidate_batch as ONE batch
batch_dispatch_contract.forbidden: submitting candidates individually to avoid joint FDR correction
batch_dispatch_contract._note: Per-candidate gating (n_effective=1 for each) would defeat the multiple-testing correction. n_effective MUST equal the total number of candidates backtested in this run.

n_raises_bar_contract.requirement: Raising N (number of candidates in the batch) raises the BHY-adjusted threshold each must clear
n_raises_bar_contract.mechanism: Yekutieli c(N) factor grows with N; the adjusted p-value threshold q/c(N) shrinks as N grows
n_raises_bar_contract._note: A candidate that passes pre-correction but not post-correction at a given N must be REJECTED when N grows further. A per-candidate implementation (n_effective=1 each) would not exhibit this monotonicity.

pre_correction_only_passers_hidden.requirement: Candidates that pass the raw p-value threshold but NOT the BHY-adjusted threshold must NOT be surfaced as recommendations
pre_correction_only_passers_hidden._note: AC-3.3. The post-correction verdict is the only valid gate verdict.

improve_momentum_timing.description: Adjust logic to better capture momentum transitions (e.g., modify lookback window)
improve_momentum_timing._note: Objective must be measurable against backtest stats, not a vibe.

reduce_whipsaw._note: Measurable via trade count or turnover proxy from the backtest.

improve_regime_filter.description: Sharpen the regime-detection condition to reduce false exits
improve_regime_filter._note: Measurable via reduction in spurious trade events in the backtest return series.

gating_contract.surfaced_as_recommendation: only ADOPT_CANDIDATE gate verdicts after post-correction FDR check
gating_contract.gate_failed_disposition: NOT surfaced as recommendation; may be shown as rejected with reason
gating_contract.zero_survivors_message_required: no logic change cleared the gate this run
gating_contract._note: AC-3.4: engine returns advisory-only result. Never auto-applies.

overfitting_caveat_contract._note: AC-3.3: every surfaced logic change must carry the mandatory overfitting caveat.

persistence_contract._note: AC-X3. Every surfaced logic change is persisted as an advisor_observation. is_advisory_only=1 is structural, not optional. AC-3.4 asserts it never auto-applies.

live_path_guard._note: AC-X2: logic_change_engine must not appear on the 1-minute live execution path.

apply_guidance_contract.format: plain text — 'To apply: open {symphony_name} in Composer and edit the logic manually.'
apply_guidance_contract.must_not_be: a button, a write endpoint call, or an auto-apply action
apply_guidance_contract._note: AC-3.4 / AC-X1: the engine never auto-applies; operator applies manually.

required_displayed_fields_per_candidate: n_candidates (int — the N in the FDR correction, for operator audit trail)
fdr_q (float — the BHY FDR level used)
caveats (non-empty list of strings for survivors)
ui_surface_contract._note: UI contract: the route must surface all of these fields per the design handoff (logic-changes-light.png). Tests assert shape, not values.
